title: Order to cook下单了！
description: 本模组提供了完整的餐厅经营模拟体验，包含接单、烹饪、打包、配送全流程及丰富的经济系统。This mod offers a complete restaurant management experience: order taking, cooking, packaging, delivery, and a rich economy system.
body:
# 🍳 Order To Cook（下单了）

**想开一家属于自己的餐厅吗？** 本模组为你提供完整的餐厅经营体验——从接单、烹饪、打包到配送，配合丰富的经济系统，打造深度又有趣的游戏玩法。

---

## 📋 模组概览

- **模组名称**：Order To Cook（下单了）
- **核心玩法**：设定菜单 → 接取外卖/堂食订单 → 制作食物 → 打包交付 → 赚取奖励
- **特色机制**：餐厅等级、加急订单、超远距离配送、小费系统、彩蛋顾客、小电驴、餐盘系统、餐厅排行、细致动画、高级厨电（新）
- **货币自定义**：默认货币为 **oTc币**，可在配置文件中自定义奖励货币，模组兼容

---

## 🎮 基础玩法

### 核心设备

- **打单机**：放置在世界中，点击打开界面等待订单刷新
- **椅子**：配合堂食顾客使用
- **操作台**：装盘和打包食物的核心工作区
- **立牌**：用于设置店铺菜单
- **包装架**：用皮革右键补充，以填充包装袋
- **餐盘架**：用空餐盘右键补充，以填充餐盘
- **洗碗池**：放入脏餐盘，空手长按右键刷盘子

### 订单系统

多种订单类型：不同等级订单、加急订单、超远距离配送订单、自动到店顾客（黄色边框，右键获取订单）

自由选择：按需接单，在操作台制作食物后打包/装盘交付

### 菜单系统（全新机制）

- ✨ **移除了原版的黑/白名单模式**
- ✨ 新增「**立牌**」方块：放置后可在其中配置你的店铺菜单
- ✨ **智能菜单识别**：订单食物**只会**从立牌设置的菜单中生成
- ✨ **设置高级食物**：同等级下的高饱食度食物会有额外奖励

---

## 📈 等级系统重制

### 打单机等级

- **等级上限提升**：餐厅等级从原来的等级扩展至 **8级**！
- **更多增益**：每升一级都能获得更丰厚的奖励加成
- **饱食度影响**：打单机升级现在会受到**立牌设置的菜单总饱食度**影响——鼓励你提供更丰富、更高级的菜品！

---

## 🎉 1.3版本更新，新增更多玩法

### 细致动画

1.3版本开始持续更新制作了玩家、顾客以及方块等动画，包括：
- 玩家坐在椅子上的待机动画
- 椅子上按鼠标左键的喝彩动画
- 洗碗动画
- 电瓶车骑行动画
- 方块动画，包括打单机新订单、冰箱、洗碗机、炉灶等
- 顾客的4种待机动画，出现和消失动画等

### 小电驴

新增载具「小电驴」，送外卖怎么能缺少它！
- 左键按喇叭、右键开车灯
- 用红色、蓝色、黄色、白色染料可以为小电驴染色
- 上车会自动为玩家戴上安全帽（安全第一）
- Shift+右键或在骑行时按E键可以打开保温箱，存入保温箱的包裹会在提示栏中带有箭头指示，支持多个外卖包裹

### 餐厅排行

- 你可以在打单机中进入排行榜，其中有服务器各个餐厅的经营情况
- 金牌餐厅（默认为按总收益排序）获得隐藏成就，暂无其他增益

### 餐盘系统

**新增方块**：
- **餐盘货架**：你可以在操作台中使用"装盘"功能，为堂食顾客提供可重复利用的餐盘盛放食物，而不再消耗皮革打包。装盘会提供多种随机食物模型，以增加趣味性。
- **洗碗池**：食物被顾客食用后会在桌上留下"脏盘"，放入洗碗池中空手右键开始刷盘子吧！

**使用餐盘效果**：
- 使用餐盘顾客会有进食动画，同时有概率触发"好吃到爆炸"效果
- 未来将有助于提升你的餐厅评价和收益！

### 高级家电（1.3.5 新增）

使用 **oTc 工具箱** 升级高级家电方块：
- **冰箱** — 双开门2格高，食材堆叠上限128，允许使用打包台时消耗冰箱食材，升级自两格高木桶
- **洗碗机** — 全自动洗碗，升级自洗碗池
- **炉灶** — 一次烧制3种食物，允许作为 农夫乐事 /Let's do / 森罗厨房的炉灶，升级自烟熏炉

---

## 🔧 模组适配与前置

- **前置模组**：**Geckolib**
- **兼容性**：Forge 1.20.1、Fabric 1.20.1、Fabric 1.21.1、NeoForge 1.21.1
- **联动说明**：
  - 联动车万女仆模组可见顾客更换为女仆，需在配置文件中开启
  - 支持将货币设置为SDM数字货币，需在配置文件中开启
  - NeoForge适配航空学模组，需额外安装我的另一个模组 [**下单了:兼容**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ordertocookcompat)
- **推荐安装**：安装我的另一个模组 [**消费了**](https://modrinth.com/mod/coin-to-shop) 用于设置商店，消耗你赚取的oTc币！

---

## 🌐 English Version

# 🍳 Order To Cook

**Want to run your own restaurant?** This mod offers a complete restaurant management experience — from taking orders and cooking to packaging and delivery, all backed by a rich economy system for deep and engaging gameplay.

---

## 📋 Mod Overview

- **Mod Name**: Order To Cook
- **Core Gameplay**: Set your menu → Accept takeout/dine-in orders → Cook the food → Package and serve → Earn rewards
- **Key Features**: Restaurant leveling, rush orders, long-distance deliveries, tipping, easter egg customers, scooter, dish system, restaurant leaderboard, detailed animations, and advanced kitchen appliances (new!)
- **Customizable Currency**: Default currency is **oTc Coin**. You can change the reward currency in the config file — the mod is compatible with other currency systems.

---

## 🎮 Basic Gameplay

### Core Equipment

- **Order Machine**: Place it in the world, right-click to open the interface and wait for orders to appear.
- **Chairs**: Used by dine-in customers.
- **Countertop**: The main workstation for plating and packaging food.
- **Sign Board**: Used to set your restaurant's menu.
- **Package Shelf**: Right-click with leather to restock packaging bags.
- **Plate Shelf (new)**: Right-click with empty plates to restock plates.
- **Sink (new)**: Place dirty plates inside, then hold right-click with an empty hand to wash them.

### Order System

Multiple order types are available:
- Orders of different levels
- Rush orders
- Long-distance delivery orders
- Walk-in customers (yellow border, right-click to take their order)

Pick and choose which orders to accept. Prepare the food at the Countertop, then either package it for delivery or plate it for dine-in service.

### Menu System (Brand New!)

- ✨ **Removed the old blacklist/whitelist system**
- ✨ **New "Sign Board" block**: Place it and configure your restaurant's menu inside.
- ✨ **Smart menu recognition**: Orders will **only** generate items that are on your Sign Board menu.
- ✨ **Premium food bonuses**: Higher-satiety foods within the same level provide extra rewards.

---

## 📈 Level System Rework

### Order Machine Levels

- **Increased level cap**: Your restaurant can now reach up to **Level 8**!
- **More perks**: Each level grants better reward bonuses.
- **Satiety influence**: Upgrading the Order Machine now takes into account the **total satiety of all items on your Sign Board menu** — encouraging you to offer a richer, higher-quality selection of dishes!

---

## 🎉 What's New in Version 1.3

### Detailed Animations

Starting with version 1.3, we've been adding smooth animations for players, customers, and blocks, including:
- Player idle animation when sitting on a chair
- Cheer animation (left-click while seated)
- Dishwashing animation
- Scooter riding animation
- Block animations for the Order Machine (new order alert), Refrigerator, Dishwasher, Stove, and more
- 4 idle animations for customers, plus entrance and exit animations

### Scooter

A new vehicle — the scooter! How could you deliver food without one?
- Left-click to honk, right-click to toggle headlights
- Dye it with red, blue, yellow, or white dye
- Automatically equips a helmet when you mount up (safety first!)
- Shift+right-click, or press E while riding, to open the insulated storage box. Packages stored inside will show an arrow indicator in the tooltip. Supports multiple delivery packages at once.

### Restaurant Leaderboard

- Access the leaderboard from the Order Machine to see how all restaurants on the server are performing.
- The top restaurant (sorted by total earnings by default) earns a hidden achievement. No other bonuses for now.

### Dish System

**New Blocks**:
- **Plate Shelf**: Use the "Plate" function at the Countertop to serve dine-in customers on reusable plates instead of consuming leather for packaging. Plating also displays a variety of random food models for extra visual flair.
- **Sink**: After customers finish eating, they leave a "dirty plate" on the table. Place it in the Sink, then right-click with an empty hand to start scrubbing!

**Effects of Using Plates**:
- Customers will play eating animations when served with plates, with a chance to trigger a "so tasty it explodes" effect.
- In future updates, this will also help boost your restaurant's rating and earnings!

### Advanced Kitchen Appliances (New in 1.3.5)

Upgrade your kitchen with the **OtC Upgrade Box**:
- **Refrigerator** — Double-door, 2-block tall. Food stack limit increased to 128. Allows the Countertop to pull ingredients directly from the fridge. Upgrades from a 2-block tall barrel.
- **Dishwasher** — Fully automatic dishwashing. Upgrades from the Sink.
- **Stove** — Cooks up to 3 types of food at once. Also functions as a stove for Farmers' Delight, Farm & Charm, and Forest Kitchen. Upgrades from the Smoker.

---

## 🔧 Compatibility & Dependencies

- **Required Dependency**: **Geckolib**
- **Supported Platforms**: Forge 1.20.1, Fabric 1.20.1, Fabric 1.21.1, NeoForge 1.21.1
- **Cross-mod Integration**:
  - Compatible with Touhou Little Maid — enable in config to replace customers with maids.
  - Can use SDM digital currency as the reward currency — enable in config.
  - For NeoForge + Aeronautics mod, you'll need to install my other mod: [**OrderToCookCompat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ordertocookcompat).
- **Recommended Addition**: Install my other mod [**Coin To Shop**](https://modrinth.com/mod/coin-to-shop) to set up shops and spend your hard-earned oTc Coins!
